Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class OutgoingEmailRelation

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.OutgoingEmailRelation
public class OutgoingEmailRelation extends SObject

Java class for OutgoingEmailRelation complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OutgoingEmailRelation">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ExternalId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutgoingEmail" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}OutgoingEmail" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutgoingEmailId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Relation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelationAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
